title: The 'Will Automation' Decision Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the human-centered decision-making process for determining if a task should be automated, emphasizing the 'why' and 'who for' over the 'how'.
relationships: Leads to evaluation of the task's suitability for automation
If automated, requires a feedback loop for Human Oversight & Control
Automation System acts to serve the Beneficiary
Final outcome must always loop back to benefit the Human
